---
title: "Preface"
---

# Preface {.unnumbered}

Open the book. State who wrote it, why, and how a reader should engage with it.

A good preface answers three questions in three short sections:

1. **What is this book?** A one-paragraph summary that distinguishes it from
   adjacent books on the same topic.
2. **Who is it for?** Be concrete — what background does the reader need? What
   will they get out of it?
3. **How is it organized?** A brief tour of the chapters and how they build on
   each other. Note any chapters readers can safely skip.

::: {.callout-tip}
## How this template is wired

The `_quarto.yml` in this directory targets the **kaobook** class via
`templates/kaobook.latex`. To switch classes, see
`beagle-latex:textbook-typography`.

To render the whole book: `quarto render`.
To render a single chapter: `quarto render chapters/01-intro.qmd`.
For incremental rebuilds while writing: `quarto preview`.
:::
